changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_open_api (id, operation_id, tags, uri_pattern, summary, `security`, parameters, request_body, responses, description, `version`, created_at, updated_at) SELECT id, name, '["NHSV-ADMIN"]', uri_pattern, name, '[{"jwt": []}]', '[{"in":"query","name":"brokerId","schema":{"type":"number"},"required":true,"description":"Selected Broker Id"}]', '[]', '{"200":{"brokers":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"username":{"type":"string"},"fullname":{"type":"string"},"email":{"type":"string"},"isDynamic":{"type":"boolean"},"status":{"type":"string"},"createdAt":{"type":"string"},"updatedAt":{"type":"string"},"deactivatedAt":{"type":"string"},"deactivatedBy":{"type":"string"},"invitedBy":{"type":"string"},"chatRooms":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"number"},"groupName":{"type":"string"},"introduction":{"type":"boolean"},"photo":{"type":"string"},"totalView":{"type":"number"},"socialLinks":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string"},"link":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}}}}},"description":"OK"},"401":{"description":"Your access token is invalid or expired"}}', 'get Broker Profile', '/api/v1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope WHERE name = 'NHSV-VIEW-BROKER-PROFILE';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV-VIEW-BROKER-PROFILE' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC';
